name: claude-perf
description: Web performance engineering skill for Claude Code — Core Web Vitals diagnosis, bundle analysis, rendering pipeline audits, CDN strategy, real-user monitoring, and CI budget enforcement.

plugins.name: perf
plugins.description: Master /perf command with 13 sub-skills (cwv, bundle, render, images, fonts, network, caching, third-party, ssr, mobile, accessibility, plan, monitor) and 7 parallel subagents that fan out for full audits.
